markets.no_sub_title: kimi-k2.5-thinking
markets.rules_primary: If kimi-k2.5-thinking is the top-ranked AI model on Mar 21, 2026 at 10:00 AM ET, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: If two models are tied under Rank (UB), then the model with the highest Arena Score will win.
